text: Ordinance printers are delivered with an arrangement CD to assist customers with interfacing the printer to a PC. Contingent upon the printer model, the Canon printer arrangement CD may incorporate some additional product applications identified with printing. For instance, the Pixma MX922 accompanies Easy-PhotoPrint and My Image Garden applications for making and printing photograph ventures. Despite the fact that the CD gives a helpful method to rapidly get to the product required for printing, you may in any case have the option to associate a PC to a Canon printer regardless of whether you don't have the CD. https://www.easyprintersupport.com/install-canon-printer-without-cd/
